proves both governed origins are allowed while production (app.xlooop.com), sibling hosts, suffix-attack hosts, other Pages projects, and stray-comma patterns stay refused

requires exactly the two governed origin entries so the pilot boundary cannot silently widen to production or a bare apex wildcard

writes the freshness authority that never existed: ensure-mbp-projection-fresh.mjs:62-67 spawned this exact path and treated non-zero as stale, so MODULE_NOT_FOUND hard-wired freshnessOk() to false and a projection valid until tomorrow was reported expired; verify-projection-cron-liveness.mjs:21,88 names it as the owner of fail-closed freshness. Two consumers, no producer

restages the projection regenerated from MB-P main 8f3aa067 (PR #1610), now carrying domains[] with the operator's canonical 11-domain taxonomy; external-safe metadata_readonly/metadata_only, no path field, validates 3/3 against the unchanged v1 schema
matching export manifest for the restaged projection

new helper: answers 'can THIS checkout see machine-local (gitignored) inputs' via --absolute-git-dir != --git-common-dir. git worktree add never copies gitignored files, so a linked worktree cannot see the deploy receipt this repo already declares intentionally mutable in the seed_exclusion at delta backend-lifecycle-contracts-20260714. Resolves git's possibly-relative --git-common-dir the same way scripts/cwd-anchor.mjs:109 does, and fails CLOSED to false so callers never refuse on a guess

stops the generator fabricating a production regression: run from a linked worktree it flipped verdict go -> operator_gated and emitted drift 'no deploy receipt at evidence/latest-cloudflare-prod-deploy-receipt.json', because that input is gitignored (.gitignore:79) and exists only in the primary checkout. Its output is a COMMITTED file carrying a production verdict, so an agent could push the false regression. Now refuses (exit 2, writes nothing) when the input is unavailable in this checkout; in the PRIMARY, absence is still a real finding and the drift flag fires unchanged

same lookup-failure trap in the sibling verifier (:77): from a linked worktree it reported 'production-readiness state BROKEN' on the strength of a file this checkout was never going to have. Now refuses rather than failing a check it never actually evaluated; its --self-test harness is untouched and still passes

2026-07-17 architecture-audit P0-B hardening: adds an opt-in GUC guard (xlooop.allow_personal_seed) so the operator-personal life-domain seed can never apply to a customer/fork deployment by default. Already-applied DBs unaffected (version-11 short-circuit). Companion migration 080 adds the missing RLS policy on synthetic_domains. The seed content itself is UNCHANGED - only the applicability gate is new.

W2 R3 (audit gap G7): normalise the completion aliases done|completed -> achieved at the route edge before dal.updateGoal. The route's own shadow-policy block already recognised those aliases, but body.status reached the DAL raw while the DB CHECK (006:101) admits only proposed|active|achieved|abandoned - a latent constraint violation. The DB vocabulary stays the glossary truth; the CHECK is not widened.

adds the verify:rls-grant-parity script. The gate asserts the invariant behind the whole RLS cutover: a table GRANTed to the NOBYPASSRLS role xlooop_app must have row-level security, or carry a reasoned exemption. Until now that pairing was enforced only by migration authors reading each other's header comments (047 argues its folder_snapshots grant is safe in prose) - a rule with no tool.
binds verify:rls-grant-parity into the local gate chain beside the other static trust proofs, so the invariant is checked on every run rather than on recall.

S3 intent-spine binding: the W1 G2 companion operation_events INSERT now carries intent_id via a workspace-scoped scalar subquery (task_packets.event_id -> operation_events.intent_id) inside the same RLS transaction. Server-derived only; packet_id remains the sole client input. NULL packet / NULL event_id / intent-less event collapse to NULL (byte-identical for those cases). Closes the seam where agent tool actions wrote spine events but never joined the intent lineage spine (ADR-ABS-011: intents = sole spine SSOT).

S3 tests: mock answers the packet-assert SELECT; 2 new tests pin server-side intent derivation (subquery text + parameterization, no body-carried intent) and packet-less NULL-collapse same-shape. 8/8 pass.

deltas.reconciliation_note: Receipt catch-up for legitimate in-repo evolution across the merged 260718-260720 governance waves (PRs #15/#16/#17/#21/#24/#26 + Wave M-B 6483a2d). Each file's drift is traced to its merged PR (git log -1 per path at 052a3b2) - graduated evolution, not corruption. This entry APPENDS per the repo contract (later synchronization requires a new receipt; originals immutable). verify:provenance had been RED since before PR #16, front-gating ci-local for every session. Full drift set = 19 files (the first pass recorded 7; the remainder surfaced on the untruncated verifier run - all traced to the same merged waves).
